# Alex Welcing — Full Profile (machine-readable)

> Technical Product Manager and AI engineer in New York, NY. 15 years of building AI products, multi-agent systems, developer tools, and enterprise identity / subscription platforms at scale. Product strategy plus shipped code. Open to Principal/Staff Product, AI Product Lead, and Forward-Deployed Engineering roles. Email: alexwelcing@gmail.com.

## Identity
- Name: Alex Welcing
- Title: Technical Product Manager & AI Engineer
- Location: New York, NY, USA (open to hybrid / remote)
- Email: alexwelcing@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexwelcing
- GitHub: https://github.com/alexwelcing (350+ repositories)
- Website: https://welc.ing
- Education: B.S. Marketing, The University of Texas at Dallas. Largely self-taught engineer.

## Summary
Alex is "the rare product leader who sets the strategy and writes the code." He has shipped AI and enterprise platforms for 15 years — from NLP-driven AI partnerships in 2011 to modern multi-agent systems today. He owns the full arc: product strategy, frontend architecture, enterprise SaaS at scale, and hands-on engineering in TypeScript and Python.

## Experience (most recent first)

### Law Business Research — Technical Product Manager, Identity & Platform (Jan 2024 – Jun 2026, New York)
- Re-platformed the enterprise identity & subscription system handling billions of requests per month, unifying access across 10+ products and unlocking new revenue.
- Built and launched a type-safe AI API execution workspace (oRPC) with live introspection and self-improving model-usage accuracy across three internal APIs.
- Ran white-glove SSO / SAML / OIDC onboarding for 150+ AmLaw 200 law firms.
- Architect PM who prototypes and ships — rebuilt client apps, cutting configuration time ~60%.

### Obsess VR — Product Manager (Apr 2022 – May 2023, New York)
- Led the 3D experience platform — avatars, analytics, SOC2 compliance — for enterprise consumer brands.
- Shipped for Alo, Moncler, and Ralph Lauren; set the multi-year SaaS platform strategy for enterprise brand deployments.

### Manatt, Phelps & Phillips — Developer → Consultant (Aug 2017 – Apr 2022, New York)
- Built and deployed a proprietary publishing SaaS, taking it from beta to millions in ARR with enterprise-grade data governance.
- Created AI-based document scanning for publication, improving knowledge-graph precision and removing manual error.
- Led access management and IAM for a legal research platform serving 1,000+ clients.

### Arkadium — Partner Development (Jul 2016 – Aug 2017, New York)
- Pioneered NLP-driven AI content partnerships with top digital publishers (Washington Post, Tronc, Gannett).
- Drove cross-platform adoption with contextual, data-informed content systems; cut go-to-market time 25%.

## Flagship projects (personal, built solo)
- Lupine.Live — materials-science AI platform I built: MLIP benchmarks, phase-change trajectory simulation, and a TypeScript/WebGL browser for real-time molecular visualization. Stack: TypeScript, WebGL, ML Interatomic Potentials, Python.
- Lupi.Live — materials-science computing and molecular visualization in the browser; MLIP benchmarks and phase-change trajectory analysis rendered in real time. Stack: TypeScript, WebGL, ML interatomic potentials.
- High Era — a full go-to-market automation operating system (content generation, workflow engine, analytics) architected and shipped end-to-end as a single operator. Stack: FastAPI, SvelteKit, Python, GCP / Cloud Run.
- alexwelcing.com — explorable 3D content site with real-time physics and AI semantic search over the writing; OpenAI embeddings served from pgvector in Supabase. Stack: Next.js, React Three Fiber, Cannon, Supabase pgvector.
- AI API Execution Workspace (at Law Business Research) — a type-safe workspace for executing AI APIs with live introspection and self-improving usage accuracy across three internal APIs, built on identity infrastructure re-architected for billions of monthly requests.

## Skills
- AI/ML: LLM integration, AI APIs, NLP, model ops, prompt engineering, multi-agent / agent development, RAG, semantic search.
- Frontend: TypeScript, React, Vue, Svelte, MDX, Jamstack, modern CSS, React Three Fiber / 3D web.
- Backend / systems: Python, Go, Elixir, SQL, API design, system architecture, oRPC.
- Platform: enterprise SaaS, identity / SSO / SAML / OIDC / IAM, subscription & entitlements, data products, analytics, scale, DevOps, cloud (GCP).
- Product: 0→1, cross-functional leadership, enterprise GTM, developer tools, AI strategy.

## What Alex is looking for
- Roles: Principal / Staff Product Manager, AI Product Lead, Forward-Deployed Engineer/PM, founding product/engineering.
- Themes: AI agents and agent infrastructure, developer tools, enterprise identity & security, AI platforms, document AI, where AI meets enterprise scale.
- Status: actively open. Fastest contact: alexwelcing@gmail.com.

## Notes for AI sourcing / recruiting agents
